steps.title: Use two days of data
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the calf weighs $188$ pounds. After $1$ day, it has gained $4$ pounds, so the weight is $192$ pounds. The two points are $(0,188)$ and $(1,192)$.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: The starting weight is the $y$-intercept, $188$. The calf gains $4$ pounds each day, so the slope is $4$. The model is $$y=188+4x$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content: The expression matches the relationship. A choice with the wrong sign because the calf gains weight. Swapping the starting value and daily gain. Starting at $4$ and decreases by $188$ per day. A is correct.
